scripts.build: rm -f api/index.js api/index.js.map src/index.js src/index.js.map && bun run build:bundle
scripts.build:bundle: mkdir -p public/server && bun build ./api/index.ts --outfile ./public/index.js --target node --minify --sourcemap=linked && bun build ./src/bunServe.ts --outfile ./public/server/index.js --target bun --minify --sourcemap=linked
